title: A weird mod
description:
this is a pretty weird mod,
know what you're getting yourself into
body:
## A cursed mod, made for a youtube video you can find here:

**[The Youtube Video](https://youtu.be/JKTh4D9Uw20?si=nWEYjp1QIA32CIFv)
or watch it here:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JKTh4D9Uw20" title="Greedy Allay" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod adds some interesting items, such as
### - A CaveHouse miner
  This allows you to mine 3 by 3 blocks and replace the stone with any item in your offhand
### - A "Kakkie" block
  The questionable block that has negative slipperiness
### - A "Pistoletje"
  A pistol which is beyond unrealistic
### - A Toggleable Light Block
### - An explosive enchantment, called aaaa
 Goes up to 99
### - Nuke Miner
  Mines incredibly large areas!
### - Normal 3 by 3 miner
### - Reinforcer
  Allows you to turn blocks into almost unbreakable blocks and return them to their original form
### - Adds a new dimension
   you can form by making a portal shape with the blocks you get from reinforcing blocks
### - God potion
   You will regret wanting to be a god.
### - Ender maid & interesting dragon player
